# vscode-icons assets

The SVG files in this directory are selected assets from
[vscode-icons](https://github.com/vscode-icons/vscode-icons), the icon set
published for the `vscode-icons-team.vscode-icons` Visual Studio Code
extension.

- Source: `https://github.com/vscode-icons/vscode-icons/tree/master/icons`
- Icon license: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike (CC BY-SA)
- Source code license: MIT

The selection is bundled locally for the Echo Mirage Operators file tree so
icons remain available in the desktop application without a network request.
